scripts.build:wasm: rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown && cd wasm && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir ../pkg target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/debug/izel_playground.wasm
scripts.build:wasm:release: rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown && cd wasm && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir ../pkg target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/izel_playground.wasm
